raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiſſa Draudsiba
bij farunnajſees/ wehl zittas ſep-
tinas Deenas turreht/ tad tee tur-
reja wehl zittas ſeptinas Deenas
ar Breeku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo Iſtijus tas Kehniſsch
no Juhda dewe tai Draudſei
tuhkfſtoſchus Wehrſchus/ un ſep-
tix tuhkfſtochas Awis. Un tee
Leeli-Kungi dewe tai Draudſei
tuhkfſtochus Wehrſchus/ un deſ-
mits tuhkfſtochas Awis. Ta
ſwehtijahs tee Preestexi leelâ
Pulkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſa Juhda Drau-
dſiba preezajahs/ lihds ar teem
Preestereem un Lewiteem/ ir wiſ-
fa ta Drandſe/ kas no Israëta
bija nahkufi/ un tee Sweschinee-
ki/ kas no Israëta Semmes bija
atnahkufchi/ un kas eekſch Juhda
Dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta bija leels Breekß Je-
rusalême/ jo no Salamana Dah-
wida Dehla tu Israëta kehnixa
Latka/ tas ne bija Jerusalêmê
ta patt bijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs tee Preeste-
Gr: rt/ kas Lewitt bija / un ſwehtija
tohs Landis/ un winnu Balſs
tappe paktausitta/ jo winnu Lubq-
chana nahze pee winna ſwehta
Dsihwokra Debbeſis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pamahja tohs Landis/ ka tee teen
ſtereem un Lewiteem Uſturreschannu
2/4. Kas arridsan noteek: 10/etc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad tee nu ſcho wiſſi
Israelitert/ ka
rasti tappe Juhda Pilsfah
un notaufija tahs uzſeltas
des/ un nozirte tohs Eſka
ſchus/ un avgahfe tohs Aug
mus un Altarns no wiſſa
da un Benjamina / un Een-
ma un Manassus/ teekams
wiſſu bij iſnihzinajſchi. Un
greesahs wiſſi Israëta Be-
atpaklak ikkatrs pee fawas D-
woſchanas winnu Pilsfachtô
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Iſtijus eestahdija
Preestexu un Lewitu Kah-
pehz ſawas Lihdsibas/ ik-
pehz ſawu Darbu/ tohs Pre-
eus un Lewitus par teem
Dſamo-Uppureem un Pateikſ-
nas-Uppureem/ ka teem bij
poht/ un teikt/ un flaweht ee-
ta KUNGA Lehgezu Wahrt
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un (wiſch eestahd-
arridsan) ta kehuina Dal-
pee teem Dedsamo-Uppuxeem
fawa Padohma Rihtês
Wakkarês/ un pee teem Ded-
mo-Uppuxeem Swebdeenâs
jannôs Mehnekhdês / un ee-
tös augſtês Sweihtkds/ ittin
ta KUNGA Banlibâ re-
ſthts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch tazzija ns tee
Landim / kas Jerusalêmê ds-
woja/ ka teem bij teem Prees-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
